endpoints.summary: Combined place/entity search with cursor pagination

params.name: q
params.description: Case-insensitive search text applied to both place and entity dimensions.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Opaque base64url cursor from prior response next_cursor.

params.name: fields
params.description: Optional projected field list for combined search rows.

notes: Search merges place and entity rows then sorts by synthetic cursor_key.
next_cursor is present when additional merged rows are available.
